# CarParts.com

> CarParts.com is an ecommerce website offering over 1 million car parts. From collision, car maintenance, and car upgrades & accessories, CarParts.com offers high quality auto parts at affordable prices.

## Key Landing Pages
- [Home page](https://www.carparts.com/): Homepage for CarParts.com showcasing key promotions and categories
- [Blog home page](https://www.carparts.com/blog/): Hub for CarParts.com blog posts including OBD-II code explanations, DIY guides, and repair guides
- [JC Whitney Performance](https://www.carparts.com/jcwhitneyperformance): Landing page for all JC Whitney Performance parts and accessories at CarParts.com
- [CarParts Euro](https://www.carparts.com/euro): CarParts Euro is the central hub for all parts and accessories needed for European cars
- [CarParts App](https://www.carparts.com/app): The CarParts app available in both Apple's App Store and Google Play
- [Deals from CarParts](https://www.carparts.com/deals): Ability to see deals, offers and promotions for CarParts.com
- [CarParts.com Shipping Policy](https://help.carparts.com/en_us/what-is-your-shipping-policy-Hyptg7kWC): CarParts.com's shipping policy
- [CarParts.com Warranty Policy](https://help.carparts.com/en_us/products-not-covered-by-a-manufacturer-s-warranty-ryXE1QyZ0): CarParts.com warranty policy for purchased parts
- [CarParts.com Return Policy](https://help.carparts.com/en_us/need-to-return-an-item-r1yr91ReC): Return policy for purchases on CarParts.com
- [Track CarParts.com Order](https://www.carparts.com/myaccount/trackorder): Tool to track your CarParts.com order
- [Return a Part](https://www.carparts.com/myaccount/rma): Submit a return request for a CarParts.com purchase
- [Contact CarParts.com](https://www.carparts.com/help-center/contact-us): Contact page for CarParts.com
